    where
        vpq1_0.status='PENDING' 
    order by
        vpq1_0.created_at 
    limit
        ?

        qs1_0.title 
    from
        question q1_0 
    left join
        question_set qs1_0

    left join
        site_user su1_0 
            on su1_0.id=qs1_0.id

        q1_0.question_id=?
